model: the mpon notifies the mpoo about equipment change intentions
the mpoo announces self dismounting to the mpon
the mpoo  notifies the mpon about no self-dismounting of the mpoo
the mpon reads the meter count from the installed meter
the mpon sents the values of the final reading to the go

user_text:
The process begins with the MPON notifying the MPOO about intentions to change equipment. Following this notification, a decision is made. If the MPOO decides to proceed with self-dismounting, they announce this decision to the MPON. Alternatively, if the MPOO decides not to proceed with self-dismounting, they notify the MPON of this decision.

Regardless of the decision made, the process continues with either the MPON or the MPOO performing a final reading of the equipment. After the final reading is completed, the next step involves either the MPON or the MPOO dismounting the old equipment.

Once the old equipment is dismounted, the MPON mounts the new device. After the new device is installed, the MPON reads the meter count from the newly installed meter. The MPON then sends the values from the final reading to the GO.

Following this, the MPON provides the GO with the required data. The process continues with the GO notifying the MSP about the required data. This marks the end of the process.
output_text:
The process begins with the MPON informing the MPOO about their intentions to change equipment. Following this notification, there is a decision point where the MPOO must choose between two options. 

In the first option, the MPOO decides to announce to the MPON that they will dismount the equipment themselves. In the second option, the MPOO informs the MPON that they will not be dismounting the equipment themselves. Regardless of the choice made, the process continues to the next step.

Next, either the MPON or the MPOO carries out a final reading of the equipment. After this reading is completed, the old equipment is dismounted by either the MPON or the MPOO. Once the old equipment is removed, the MPON proceeds to install the new device.

After the new device is mounted, the MPON reads the meter count from the newly installed meter. The MPON then sends the values obtained from the final reading to the GO. Following this, the MPON communicates the required data to the GO, and in turn, the GO notifies the MSP about the necessary data.

The process concludes after these communications are completed.
